# AUTO-GENERATED by tools/epbm_generator/. Hand edits will be lost on the next run.
# Per-PM script values: compute goods-based maintenance from building scope.
# Each prices its goods against the building's local market and scales by level.

epbm_artisan_guilds_maintenance_upkeep = {
	value = 0
	add = { value = "location.market.market_price(goods:tools)" multiply = 0.05 }
	add = { value = "location.market.market_price(goods:leather)" multiply = 0.05 }
	add = { value = "location.market.market_price(goods:lumber)" multiply = 0.05 }
	multiply = building_level
}

epbm_bulgarian_administration_center_maintenance_upkeep = {
	value = 0
	add = { value = "location.market.market_price(goods:paper)" multiply = 0.2 }
	add = { value = "location.market.market_price(goods:masonry)" multiply = 0.2 }
	add = { value = "location.market.market_price(goods:lumber)" multiply = 0.2 }
	multiply = building_level
}

epbm_burgher_mansion_maintenance_upkeep = {
	value = 0
	add = { value = "location.market.market_price(goods:cloth)" multiply = 0.1 }
	add = { value = "location.market.market_price(goods:furniture)" multiply = 0.05 }
	add = { value = "location.market.market_price(goods:glass)" multiply = 0.025 }
	multiply = building_level
}

epbm_cathedral_maintenance_upkeep = {
	value = 0
	add = { value = "location.market.market_price(goods:glass)" multiply = 0.05 }
	add = { value = "location.market.market_price(goods:cloth)" multiply = 0.05 }
	add = { value = "location.market.market_price(goods:fine_cloth)" multiply = 0.025 }
	add = { value = "location.market.market_price(goods:paper)" multiply = 0.1 }
	add = { value = "location.market.market_price(goods:copper)" multiply = 0.05 }
	add = { value = "location.market.market_price(goods:tools)" multiply = 0.05 }
	multiply = building_level
}

epbm_cinque_port_maintenance_upkeep = {
	value = 0
	add = { value = "location.market.market_price(goods:tar)" multiply = 0.2 }
	add = { value = "location.market.market_price(goods:naval_supplies)" multiply = 0.4 }
	add = { value = "location.market.market_price(goods:tools)" multiply = 0.1 }
	add = { value = "location.market.market_price(goods:lumber)" multiply = 0.2 }
	add = { value = "location.market.market_price(goods:stone)" multiply = 0.1 }
	multiply = building_level
}

	add = { value = "location.market.market_price(goods:books)" multiply = 0.25 }
	multiply = building_level

	multiply = building_level

	value = 0
	add = { value = "location.market.market_price(goods:cloth)" multiply = 0.01 }
	add = { value = "location.market.market_price(goods:paper)" multiply = 0.05 }
	add = { value = "location.market.market_price(goods:weaponry)" multiply = 0.05 }
	multiply = building_level
}

# Dispatch: returns the correct PM upkeep for estate-assigned buildings.
# Scope: building.

epbm_estate_building_upkeep = {
	if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:artisan_guilds }
		value = epbm_artisan_guilds_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:bulgarian_administration_center }
		value = epbm_bulgarian_administration_center_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:burgher_mansion }
		value = epbm_burgher_mansion_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:cathedral }
		value = epbm_cathedral_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:cinque_port }
		value = epbm_cinque_port_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:clerical_archives }
		value = epbm_clerical_archives_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:corporation_of_london }
		value = epbm_corporation_of_london_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:festival_grounds }
		value = epbm_festival_grounds_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:free_village }
		value = epbm_free_village_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:gallowglass_sept }
		value = epbm_gallowglass_sept_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:guild_hall }
		value = epbm_guild_hall_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:local_assembly }
		value = epbm_local_assembly_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:local_estates }
		value = epbm_local_estates_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:local_markets }
		value = epbm_local_markets_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:local_newspaper }
		value = epbm_upkeep_local_newspaper_maintenance
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:local_noble_delegation }
		value = epbm_local_noble_delegation_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:local_schools }
		value = epbm_local_schools_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:local_shrine }
		value = epbm_local_shrine_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:maniot_toll_guards }
		value = epbm_maniot_toll_guards_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:merchants_guild }
		value = epbm_merchants_guild_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:nobility_fortifications }
		value = epbm_nobility_fortifications_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:noble_courts }
		value = epbm_noble_courts_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:noble_villa }
		value = epbm_noble_villa_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:nobled_sponsored_temple }
		value = epbm_nobled_sponsored_temple_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:nobles_mansion }
		value = epbm_nobles_mansion_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:nobles_recruitment_center }
		value = epbm_nobles_recruitment_center_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:parish_church }
		value = epbm_parish_church_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:peasants_hunting_grounds }
		value = epbm_peasants_hunting_grounds_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:peasants_training_grounds }
		value = epbm_peasants_training_grounds_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:pirate_haven }
		value = epbm_pirate_haven_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:pirate_stronghold }
		value = epbm_pirate_stronghold_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:rotten_borough }
		value = epbm_rotten_borough_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:spiritual_retreat }
		value = epbm_spiritual_retreat_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:toll_castle }
		value = epbm_toll_castle_maintenance_upkeep
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { building_type = building_type:warrior_monks_training_grounds }
		value = epbm_warrior_monks_training_grounds_maintenance_upkeep
	}
}
